# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /opt/devkitpro/BrewProjects/Switch-Clock/build-ninja
# It was generated by CMake: /opt/devkitpro/msys2/usr/bin/cmake.exe
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//fontstash use stream
BRLS_FONTSTASH_STREAM:BOOL=OFF

//Unity build
BRLS_UNITY_BUILD:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/devkitA64/bin/aarch64-none-elf-addr2line.exe

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/devkitA64/bin/aarch64-none-elf-gcc-ar.exe

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ASM_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/devkitA64/bin/aarch64-none-elf-gcc.exe

CMAKE_ASM_STANDARD_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES:STRING=/opt/devkitpro/libnx/include

CMAKE_ASM_STANDARD_LIBRARIES:STRING=-lnx -lm

//Choose the type of build, options are: None Debug Release RelWithDebInfo
// MinSizeRel ...
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=Release

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:STRING=/opt/devkitpro/devkitA64/bin/aarch64-none-elf-g++.exe

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/devkitA64/bin/aarch64-none-elf-gcc-ar.exe

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/devkitA64/bin/aarch64-none-elf-gcc-ranlib.exe

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=-march=armv8-a+crc+crypto -mtune=cortex-a57 -mtp=soft -ftls-model=local-exec -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -D__SWITCH__

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g -Og -DDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-g -Oz -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-g -O2 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-g -O2 -DNDEBUG

CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES:STRING=/opt/devkitpro/libnx/include

CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_LIBRARIES:STRING=-lnx -lm

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:STRING=/opt/devkitpro/devkitA64/bin/aarch64-none-elf-gcc.exe

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/devkitA64/bin/aarch64-none-elf-gcc-ar.exe

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/devkitA64/bin/aarch64-none-elf-gcc-ranlib.exe

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=-march=armv8-a+crc+crypto -mtune=cortex-a57 -mtp=soft -ftls-model=local-exec -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -D__SWITCH__

//Flags used by the C compiler during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g -Og -DDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-g -Oz -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-g -O2 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-g -O2 -DNDEBUG

CMAKE_C_STANDARD_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES:STRING=/opt/devkitpro/libnx/include

CMAKE_C_STANDARD_LIBRARIES:STRING=-lnx -lm

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=-L/opt/devkitpro/libnx/lib -L/opt/devkitpro/portlibs/switch/lib -fPIE -specs=/opt/devkitpro/libnx/switch.specs

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Enable/Disable output of build database during the build.
CMAKE_EXPORT_BUILD_DATABASE:BOOL=

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/opt/devkitpro/BrewProjects/Switch-Clock/build-ninja/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//User executables (bin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR:PATH=bin

//Read-only architecture-independent data (DATAROOTDIR)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATADIR:PATH=

//Read-only architecture-independent data root (share)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DATAROOTDIR:PATH=share

//Documentation root (DATAROOTDIR/doc/PROJECT_NAME)
CMAKE_INSTALL_DOCDIR:PATH=

//C header files (include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR:PATH=include

//Info documentation (DATAROOTDIR/info)
CMAKE_INSTALL_INFODIR:PATH=

//Object code libraries (lib)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR:PATH=lib

//Program executables (libexec)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBEXECDIR:PATH=libexec

//Locale-dependent data (DATAROOTDIR/locale)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALEDIR:PATH=

//Modifiable single-machine data (var)
CMAKE_INSTALL_LOCALSTATEDIR:PATH=var

//Man documentation (DATAROOTDIR/man)
CMAKE_INSTALL_MANDIR:PATH=

//C header files for non-gcc (/usr/include)
CMAKE_INSTALL_OLDINCLUDEDIR:PATH=/usr/include

//Install path prefix, prepended onto install directories.
CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/opt/devkitpro/portlibs/switch

//Run-time variable data (LOCALSTATEDIR/run)
CMAKE_INSTALL_RUNSTATEDIR:PATH=

//System admin executables (sbin)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SBINDIR:PATH=sbin

//Modifiable architecture-independent data (com)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SHAREDSTATEDIR:PATH=com

//Read-only single-machine data (etc)
CMAKE_INSTALL_SYSCONFDIR:PATH=etc

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/devkitA64/bin/aarch64-none-elf-ld.exe

//Program used to build from build.ninja files.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/msys2/usr/bin/ninja.exe

// all build types.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during
// RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

CMAKE_NM:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/devkitA64/bin/aarch64-none-elf-nm.exe

CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//If set, runtime paths are not added when installing shared libraries,
// but are added when building.
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//Flags used by the archiver during the creation of static libraries
// during all build types.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the archiver during the creation of static libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the archiver during the creation of static libraries
// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the archiver during the creation of static libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_STRIP:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/devkitA64/bin/aarch64-none-elf-strip.exe

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_TAPI:FILEPATH=CMAKE_TAPI-NOTFOUND

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Custom resources dir
CUSTOM_RESOURCES_DIR:BOOL=OFF

//DEVKITPRO
DEVKITPRO:BOOL=/opt/devkitpro

DKP_BIN2S:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/tools/bin/bin2s.exe

//Path to a program.

//Path to a program.

//Value Computed by CMake
FMT_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/opt/devkitpro/BrewProjects/Switch-Clock/build-ninja/borealis-lib/lib/extern/fmt

//Generate the cuda-test target.
FMT_CUDA_TEST:BOOL=OFF

//Debug library postfix.
FMT_DEBUG_POSTFIX:STRING=d

//Generate the doc target.
FMT_DOC:BOOL=OFF

//Generate the fuzz target.
FMT_FUZZ:BOOL=OFF

//Installation directory for include files, a relative path that
// will be joined with /opt/devkitpro/portlibs/switch or an absolute
// path.
FMT_INC_DIR:STRING=include

//Generate the install target.
FMT_INSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
FMT_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Build a module instead of a traditional library.
FMT_MODULE:BOOL=OFF

//Include OS-specific APIs.
FMT_OS:BOOL=ON

//Enable extra warnings and expensive tests.
FMT_PEDANTIC:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
FMT_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/opt/devkitpro/BrewProjects/Switch-Clock/library/borealis/library/lib/extern/fmt

//Expose headers with marking them as system.
FMT_SYSTEM_HEADERS:BOOL=OFF

//Generate the test target.
FMT_TEST:BOOL=OFF

//Enable Unicode support.
FMT_UNICODE:BOOL=ON

//Halt the compilation with an error on compiler warnings.
FMT_WERROR:BOOL=OFF

//Install to system.
INSTALL:BOOL=OFF

//The code sign identity to use when building the IPA.
IOS_CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY:STRING=

//Package name.
IOS_GUI_IDENTIFIER:STRING=

//Path to a program.
NX_BUILD_PFS0_EXE:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/tools/bin/build_pfs0.exe

//Path to a file.
NX_DEFAULT_ICON:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/libnx/default_icon.jpg

//Path to a program.
NX_ELF2KIP_EXE:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/tools/bin/elf2kip.exe

//Path to a program.
NX_ELF2NRO_EXE:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/tools/bin/elf2nro.exe

//Path to a program.
NX_ELF2NSO_EXE:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/tools/bin/elf2nso.exe

//Path to a program.
NX_NACPTOOL_EXE:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/tools/bin/nacptool.exe

//Path to a program.
NX_NPDMTOOL_EXE:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/tools/bin/npdmtool.exe

//Path to a program.
NX_UAM_EXE:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/tools/bin/uam.exe

//Arguments to supply to pkg-config
PKG_CONFIG_ARGN:STRING=

//Path to a program.
PKG_CONFIG_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/opt/devkitpro/portlibs/switch/bin/aarch64-none-elf-pkg-config

//build for Android
PLATFORM_ANDROID:BOOL=OFF

//build for desktop (Linux, macOS, Windows)
PLATFORM_DESKTOP:BOOL=OFF

//build for iOS
PLATFORM_IOS:BOOL=OFF

//build for ps4
PLATFORM_PS4:BOOL=OFF

//build for psv
PLATFORM_PSV:BOOL=OFF

//build for switch
PLATFORM_SWITCH:BOOL=OFF

//build for tvOS
PLATFORM_TVOS:BOOL=OFF

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for PkgConfig.
PkgConfig_DIR:PATH=PkgConfig_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Simple highlight
SIMPLE_HIGHLIGHT:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
SwitchTimer_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/opt/devkitpro/BrewProjects/Switch-Clock/build-ninja

//Value Computed by CMake
SwitchTimer_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
SwitchTimer_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/opt/devkitpro/BrewProjects/Switch-Clock

//Attempts to build the documentation. You'll need doxygen and
// graphviz installed
TWEENY_BUILD_DOCUMENTATION:BOOL=OFF

//Adds a 'sandbox' target that links to tweeny. Useful when exploring
// tweeny
TWEENY_BUILD_SANDBOX:BOOL=OFF

//Joins together all header files in a single one. Needs Python
// 3.6 and quom installed
TWEENY_BUILD_SINGLE_HEADER:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
Tweeny_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/opt/devkitpro/BrewProjects/Switch-Clock/build-ninja/borealis-lib/lib/extern/tweeny

//Value Computed by CMake
Tweeny_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
Tweeny_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/opt/devkitpro/BrewProjects/Switch-Clock/library/borealis/library/lib/extern/tweeny

//Whether to use the boost::filesystem instead of std::filesystem
USE_BOOST_FILESYSTEM:BOOL=OFF

//Using EGL instead of native GL.
USE_EGL:BOOL=OFF

//using OpenGL 2.1
USE_GL2:BOOL=OFF

//using OpenGL 3.2+
USE_GL3:BOOL=OFF

//using OpenGL ES 2.0
USE_GLES2:BOOL=OFF

//using OpenGL ES 3.0
USE_GLES3:BOOL=OFF

//using glfw for input and create window
USE_GLFW:BOOL=OFF

//using libromfs to bundle resources
USE_LIBROMFS:BOOL=OFF

//using sdl2 for input and create window
USE_SDL2:BOOL=OFF

//Whether to use std::thread instead of pthread
USE_STD_THREAD:BOOL=OFF

//Dependencies for the target
borealis_LIB_DEPENDS:STATIC=general;fmt;general;yogacore;general;tinyxml2;general;deko3d;general;nx;general;m;

//Value Computed by CMake
yogacore_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/opt/devkitpro/BrewProjects/Switch-Clock/build-ninja/borealis-lib/lib/extern/yoga/yoga

//Value Computed by CMake
yogacore_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
yogacore_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/opt/devkitpro/BrewProjects/Switch-Clock/library/borealis/library/lib/extern/yoga/yoga

//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO
CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_NM
CMAKE_NM-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//number of local generators
CMAKE_NUMBER_OF_MAKEFILES:INTERNAL=5
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_OBJCOPY
CMAKE_OBJCOPY-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_OBJDUMP
CMAKE_OBJDUMP-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Platform information initialized
CMAKE_PLATFORM_INFO_INITIALIZED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_RANLIB
CMAKE_RANLIB-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_READELF
CMAKE_READELF-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Path to CMake installation.
CMAKE_ROOT:INTERNAL=/opt/devkitpro/msys2/usr/share/cmake
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_STRIP
CMAKE_STRIP-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_TAPI
CMAKE_TAPI-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//uname command
CMAKE_UNAME:INTERNAL=/opt/devkitpro/msys2/usr/bin/uname.exe
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Details about finding PkgConfig
FIND_PACKAGE_MESSAGE_DETAILS_PkgConfig:INTERNAL=[/opt/devkitpro/portlibs/switch/bin/aarch64-none-elf-pkg-config][v2.5.1()]
//ADVANCED property for variable: PKG_CONFIG_ARGN
PKG_CONFIG_ARGN-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: PKG_CONFIG_EXECUTABLE
PKG_CONFIG_EXECUTABLE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX during last run
_GNUInstallDirs_LAST_CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:INTERNAL=/opt/devkitpro/portlibs/switch
